推荐场景: 活动现场入口｜听懂时间地点变化
60秒任务: 「活动通知」：公告主旨/影响判断；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 公告｜通知｜原因｜时间地点｜简短说明｜主旨理解
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
The event will take place on ___.（说明日期）
It starts at ___ and ends at ___.（说明时间）
The location has changed to ___.（说明地点变化）
Please register before ___.（说明报名截止）
You need to bring ___.（说明携带物）
The activity is open to ___.（说明参与对象）
Tickets are limited, so book early.（说明限制与建议）
Because of the weather, part of the event is indoors.（说明原因）
Can I still join if I’m late?（询问迟到情况）
Where should we meet first?（询问集合点）
I’ll share the notice with the group.（说明转发）
Let’s add it to the calendar.（行动项）
So we meet at the main entrance, right?（复述确认）
If anything changes, they’ll send another message.（说明更新）
Sounds good. I’ll be there.（确认参加）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: event, notice, location, main entrance, ticket, registration, calendar
Verbs: take place, start, end, register, bring, join
Adjectives / Adverbs: limited, late, indoors, open
Time / Place: on Saturday, before Friday, at six, main entrance
Chunks: event notice, location has changed, register before, meet first, add it to the calendar
